zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期下行震荡趋势
zh.content:
目前以太坊价格位于1764美元，接近日内低点，显示短期承压迹象。20日简单移动平均线（SMA20）在1781附近，价格位于均线下方，暗示短期空头力量占优。MACD为-19.80568，处于负值区间，表明下行动能仍在，但缺少信号线数据需谨慎解读。

支撑位初步关注1760附近，若失守可能测试1750及更低支撑。阻力位则在1780-1785区间，若价格反弹突破，可能形成短线反弹机会。成交量未提供，但结合价格走势，可判断当前市场偏向低位震荡。

交易策略上，短线操作宜以高抛低吸为主，避免追涨。激进者可在关键支撑附近考虑小仓位做多，止损控制在支撑下方5-10美元。保守者可等待MACD形成明确金叉或价格稳定回升至均线以上再入场。

综合来看，以太坊短期呈弱势震荡，关注1760支撑能否守住，突破阻力1785将是反转信号。投资者应保持风险控制，关注关键技术指标变化以调整仓位。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum (ETH) is currently exhibiting a short-term bearish bias against the US Dollar, with the price testing the lower boundary of the recent trading range around $1764. The latest 24-hour movement of -0.49% suggests some selling pressure, while the high of $1778 shows the market’s temporary resistance. The short-term trend remains cautious, as price is trading below the 20-period simple moving average (SMA), which at $1781.17 acts as a key dynamic resistance level.

Technical indicators reinforce this cautious outlook. The MACD reading of -19.80568 indicates downward momentum, even though the signal line is unavailable for confirmation. The lack of an RSI value limits overbought/oversold assessment, but the negative MACD combined with price below the SMA signals that bears maintain control. Traders should be alert for potential consolidation near the current level, as any bounce off $1764 could trigger short-term recovery attempts.

Key support and resistance levels are critical for framing trading strategies. Immediate support resides at $1760–$1764, a zone that has previously absorbed selling pressure. Resistance is evident at $1781 (SMA20) and extends to $1790, which represents a psychological barrier where buyers may struggle to maintain upward momentum. A decisive move above $1781 could shift the short-term trend into bullish territory, while a drop below $1760 may open the path toward $1745–$1750.

From a tactical perspective, traders might consider a cautious approach. Short-term sellers could look for entries near the SMA20 or failed recovery attempts, while risk-aware buyers might wait for confirmation of a support hold around $1764–$1760. Given current momentum and price action, it is prudent to combine indicator signals with strict risk management, placing stop losses near support/resistance boundaries to navigate the prevailing uncertainty.  

Word count: 268
